problem: How does gut microbiome composition directly affect brain chemistry and mood?
mechanism: Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins
hypothesis: How does gut microbiome composition directly affect brain chemistry and mood? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Autophagy. Autophagy activation to clear misfolded proteins directly addresses this.

experiment.protocol: Mouse model knockout study with 7 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Real knowledge is to know the extent of one's ignorance. — Confucius
